title: permissions access: Migrated workspace groups did not inherit the Billing Analyst role.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: I'm not totally sure what's going on, but something broke. multiple users are affected.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: I need to follow the standard checklist before we discuss escalation. When did this first start?

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: the problem started after a workspace migration

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: That points me toward browser cache, but I want to keep this tentative. What changed right before the issue started?

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: The confusing part is this: An early symptom seems to support browser cache, but later evidence weakens it.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: Let's test browser cache first. If that fits, we should see the same behavior on a known-good example.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: We checked one example and it seemed to fit, but then another example did not. multiple users are affected, but admins can still access the workspace.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: That weakens browser cache. I am going to abandon that path for now and check password reset.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: password reset happened to us once before, so that sounds plausible, but the symptoms are not exactly the same.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: Agreed. password reset is possible, but the evidence is mixed. I need a comparison between a working and blocked case.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: One working case has the same visible setup. Also, all affected users belong to the Billing Analyst group.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: That reverses the direction. The visible setup may not be the control point. I want to inspect the shared configuration boundary.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: I just got a note from someone else: all affected users belong to the Billing Analyst group. customer has a finance deadline in two hours and three analysts are blocked.

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: That late detail finally makes the actual path coherent. The likely root cause is: Migrated workspace groups did not inherit the Billing Analyst role.

transcript_turns.speaker: customer
transcript_turns.text: So the earlier checks were not wasted, but they were pointing at the wrong control point?

transcript_turns.speaker: agent
transcript_turns.text: Correct. The earlier paths were plausible but abandoned after conflicting evidence. Final outcome: agent identifies missing group role mapping and restores access
